mapper.select: SELECT ur.id, u.user_code, u.username, u.nickname, ur.start_time, ur.end_time, ur.enable_status, ur.create_time, ur.create_by, ur.update_time, ur.update_by FROM iam_user_role ur INNER JOIN iam_user u ON u.user_code = ur.user_code WHERE ur.deleted = 0 AND u.deleted = 0 AND ur.role_code = #{roleCode} AND u.username = #{username} AND u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%') ORDER BY ur.sort ASC, ur.id ASC

SELECT r.id, r.app_code, r.parent_code, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.applicable, IFNULL(bind.bind_count, 0) AS bind_count FROM iam_role r LEFT JOIN ( SELECT role_code, COUNT(*) AS bind_count FROM iam_user_role WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_code = #{userCode} GROUP BY role_code ) bind ON bind.role_code = r.role_code WHERE r.deleted = 0 AND r.app_code = #{appCode} ORDER BY r.sort ASC, r.id ASC

SELECT r.id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.create_time, r.create_by, r.update_time, r.update_by FROM iam_role_menu rm INNER JOIN iam_role r ON r.role_code = rm.role_code WHERE rm.deleted = 0 AND r.deleted = 0 AND rm.menu_code = #{menuCode} ORDER BY r.sort ASC, r.id ASC

SELECT u.id, u.user_code, u.username, u.nickname, r.role_code, r.role_name, ur.start_time, ur.end_time, ur.enable_status, ur.create_time, ur.create_by, ur.update_time, ur.update_by FROM iam_role_menu rm INNER JOIN iam_user_role ur ON ur.role_code = rm.role_code AND ur.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN iam_user u ON u.user_code = ur.user_code AND u.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN iam_role r ON r.role_code = rm.role_code AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE rm.deleted = 0 AND rm.menu_code = #{menuCode} ORDER BY u.sort ASC, u.id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.menu_code, m.menu_name, m.parent_code, m.menu_type, m.sort, r.role_code, r.role_name, ur.start_time, ur.end_time, ur.enable_status, ur.create_time, ur.create_by, ur.update_time, ur.update_by FROM iam_user_role ur INNER JOIN iam_role_menu rm ON rm.role_code = ur.role_code AND rm.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN iam_menu m ON m.menu_code = rm.menu_code AND m.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN iam_role r ON r.role_code = ur.role_code AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE ur.deleted = 0 AND ur.user_code = #{userCode} AND ur.app_code = #{appCode} ORDER BY m.sort ASC, m.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE iam_user_role SET enable_status = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE deleted = 0 AND enable_status = 0 AND start_time <= NOW() AND end_time >= NOW()
UPDATE iam_user_role SET enable_status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE deleted = 0 AND enable_status = 1 AND (end_time < NOW() OR start_time > NOW())
